title: Europe’s progress on future access-to-space gains momentum with upcoming reusable launcher flight test
description:
Following the successful launch of Ariane 6 in 2025, Europe’s access to space ambitions gain momentum. The launch of the reusable launcher first stage demonstrator Themis T1H under the SALTO […]

The post Europe’s progress on future access-to-space gains momentum with upcoming reusable launcher flight test  appeared first on SpaceNews.
